invariant: A recurring one-on-one brief keeps prior open loops as state claims attributed to the person, not to a neighboring account or the meeting as a whole.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = open loop stays attributed to person-b9-morgan with state temporal scope and composed source_asof remains reachable. FAIL = open loop is attributed to another subject or loses composed provenance.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds meetings, attendees, linked subjects, and intelligence_claims rows consumed by the public prepare_meeting context builder.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: MeetingBrief open_loops section exercises recurring 1:1 continuity.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pinned to the live prepare_meeting Transform canonical replay key for this claim-backed fixture.
